description: Goal: finish the source-spine cleanup by deleting retired code paths and making the new model explicit in docs and telemetry. Signal: no dead duplicate expansion or publication helpers remain; docs state the invariants clearly (quoted roots are the only source authority, QuotedExpander owns root->root rewriting, publication is one transaction, ordinary function bodies expand on function demand, and type fragments are token payloads); telemetry and fixture checks prove compiler2 is not silently falling back to old-world behavior. Strategy: remove leftovers from the earlier split paths, update the agent docs and migration docs, and add the narrow regression and telemetry checks that keep this spine honest.
title: Compiler2 source spine closeout: remove leftovers and restate the invariants
